title: cestrum benthamii
intro: Cestrum benthamii, also known as the 'Night-blooming Jasmine' or 'Queen of the Night', is a flowering plant native to South America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and pain relief. The health benefits of Cestrum benthamii include its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular natural remedy for promoting relaxation and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Cestrum benthamii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
